# EU Standard Contractual Clauses for International Transfers

Jurisdiction: European Union / EEA
Region: EU
Citation: Commission Implementing Decision (EU) 2021/914
Authority: European Commission
Source URL: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=CELEX:32021D0914
Topics: cross_border_transfer, processor_contracts, third_party_sharing, accountability
Keywords: Standard Contractual Clauses, SCCs, international transfers, controller processor

## Summary
EU modular SCCs for transfers of personal data to third countries under GDPR Chapter V.

## Key compliance obligations
- Select the correct SCC module for transfer role pairings.
- Perform transfer impact assessments where required.
- Flow down onward-transfer and processor obligations.
